metadata.title: AI Workshops - 2h to master artificial intelligence
metadata.description: 2-hour hands-on remote workshops to understand and master AI. 4 modules: fundamentals, Claude, AI tools, business integration. €120 incl. VAT per person, max 5 participants.
metadata.ogDescription: 2-hour hands-on remote workshops to understand and master AI. From first contact to business integration.

hero.title: AI Workshops
hero.subtitle:
2 hours remote, max 5 participants, a practitioner instructor.
Four modules, one progression: lucidity, mastery, discernment, vision.

comprendre.title: Understanding AI: for lucid and efficient use
comprendre.description: You hear about AI everywhere. Some are enthusiastic, others worried, most are lost. This workshop gives you the keys to understand what AI really does, and the 4 reflexes to use it without being fooled.
topics: The 4 pillars of mastered use: Contextualize, Verify, Reframe, Iterate
What AI knows how to do, what it doesn't, and what it pretends to know
Live demonstration: the same question asked two ways, two radically different results
The 6 traps everyone falls into (and how to avoid them)
Your first guided exchange with Claude, live during the workshop

maitriser.title: Mastering Claude: produce, iterate, succeed
maitriser.description:
You tested AI. The results were... average.
Normal: 80% of quality depends on how you frame the problem. This workshop gives you the method to get professional results on your real topics.
topics: The C.R.T.F. method: four reflexes for a prompt that produces
Before / after: the same topic, a mediocre result then an exploitable result
Guided exercise: transform a concrete case with the method, then iterate together
The art of iteration: moving from a first draft to a professional result
Practical guide included: configure your Claude space for sustainable use

outils.title: NotebookLM, Perplexity & Co: choosing the right AI tools
outils.description: NotebookLM, Perplexity, ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini... You've heard these names without knowing which to use, or why. This workshop gives you a clear reading grid to choose the right tool at the right time, and stop fluttering.
topics: NotebookLM: synthesize and query your documents in minutes
Perplexity: search with sources, not assumptions
Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini: real strengths, limits and positioning
The 4 pillars applied to each tool: same method, different tools
A clear choice grid: which tool for which use in your daily work

connecter.title: AI in your business: from tool to lever
connecter.description: AI in a tab is a gadget. AI connected to your data, your tools and your processes is a strategic lever. This workshop shows you concretely what becomes possible, and helps you identify your first use cases.
topics: What connected AI changes: demonstration with real tools
Plugins and integrations: how AI accesses your files, your calendar, your data
Security and confidentiality: the real questions to ask before connecting anything
Three concrete use cases commented and adaptable to your sector
Key questions to build your AI integration roadmap

niveau.question: Do you need a particular technical level?
niveau.answer: No. The "Understanding AI" workshop requires no technical skills. For "Mastering Claude", having already used an AI assistant is a plus. For "AI in your business", prior experience with AI is recommended.

ordre.question: In what order to take the workshops?
ordre.answer: We recommend starting with "Understanding AI" which lays the fundamentals. Then, "Mastering Claude" and "NotebookLM, Perplexity & Co" can be taken in the order of your choice. "AI in your business" is ideal last for a strategic vision.

format.question: Are the workshops in-person or remote?
format.answer: The workshops take place remotely (Google Meet or Zoom). This format allows direct exchange with the instructor while remaining comfortable from your office. In-person workshops are possible on request in Drôme (26), France.

preparation.question: Do you need to prepare something before the workshop?
preparation.answer: For workshops using Claude (modules 1 and 2), we ask you to create your free Claude account before the session. An email with instructions is sent upon registration.

paiement.question: How does payment work?
paiement.answer: Payment is made online securely via Stripe during your registration. You immediately receive a confirmation email.

remboursement.question: Can I be refunded?
remboursement.answer: Yes, you can cancel up to 48 hours before the workshop for a full refund. Beyond that, a credit will be offered for a later session.

participants.question: How many participants per workshop?
participants.answer: Maximum 5 participants to ensure personalized support and quality exchanges, even remotely.

supports.question: Will I receive materials?
supports.answer: Yes, each participant receives a summary PDF, additional resources and, depending on the modules, practical guides to continue autonomously.

metadata.title: AI Training - Structured paths
metadata.description: Qualiopi-certified AI training. Every participant leaves with their own AI Mentor, active long after the training. OPCO funding available.
metadata.ogDescription: Qualiopi-certified AI training. Every participant leaves with their own AI Mentor, active long after the training.

hero.title: AI Training
hero.subtitle: Structured paths to move from curiosity to competence.
hero.mentor: Every participant leaves with their own AI Mentor, active long after the training.

deciderAvecIA.description:
From "I don't dare use it" to "I make decisions with it every day". Two days on your real cases, led by a business owner who uses AI daily.

Each participant leaves with their own method and their own AI Mentor, tuned to their work and active after the training.

batirAvecClaude.description:
Deciding is using it. Building is turning it into a partner. A method for dialogue, five pillars to hold the structure: memory, project, skill, plugin, Claude Code.

Not an assistant. An operational partner, and tools that stand up.

metadata.title: Deciding with AI - Immersive training
metadata.description: Immersive 2-day training with pedagogical trio. Human trainer, playful AI co-facilitator, AI Mentor that stays with you. Qualiopi certified via ALIA Formation.
metadata.ogDescription: Immersive 2-day training. From "it's impressive" to "I know what to do with it".

hero.title: Deciding with
hero.accroche:
A human trainer. A playful AI co-facilitator.
An AI Mentor that stays with you after the training.
hero.description:
This isn't a training where we show you slides about AI. It's a training where you work with AI, live, on your real topics, for two days.
And when you leave, your AI Mentor leaves with you.

trio.label: What changes everything
trio.title: You're not alone facing a screen

formateur.description: He frames, contextualizes, adapts the pace to the group and your questions. He's the one who makes the connection between theory and your reality.

az.description: She intervenes live during the training. She reformulates, challenges, proposes different angles. She's not there to look pretty. She really co-facilitates.

assistant.description: Each participant gets their own AI Mentor, an AI expert. It stays active after the training. You leave with a tool that keeps helping you with your AI usage.

promesse.label: The promise
promesse.texte: You already know AI exists. You may have even tested ChatGPT or Claude. What you're missing isn't the wonder. It's a mental framework to use it with discernment, without being fooled, and on your real problems.

supports.texte: Everything is accessible online, during and after the training. No PDFs to lose. Your resources stay alive.

pratique.texte: You don't work on generic exercises. You work on your own topics, your own documents, your own decisions.

securite.texte: We tell you what to protect, what to verify, and how not to be fooled by a hallucinating AI.

plan.texte: You leave with a concrete plan to continue. No grand speech. Specific actions.

promesse.title1: In two days, you go from "it's impressive"
promesse.title2: to "I know what to do with it"

apres.label: What continues
apres.title: The training ends. The AI Mentor

supports.texte: All training content remains accessible online. Come back to it when you need it.

assistant.texte: The AI Mentor you worked with during training continues to support you. Same context, same reflexes.

ressources.texte: Method sheets, prompt guides, references: everything that helped you during training remains available.

evaluation.texte: A month later, we measure the real impact on your professional daily life.

programme.label: In two days
programme.title: From "I don't know what to ask it" to action plan

recadrer.texte: AI wandering? You reframe it. Like a colleague you refocus.

contextualiser.texte: Give the context AI doesn't have. Your job, your constraints, your objectives.

verifier.texte: AI can hallucinate. You verify. Always.

iterer.texte: The first draft is never the right one. You iterate to professional result.

programme.certif: Fundable. Training delivered by a Qualiopi-certified organization. Detailed program sent on request.

surmesure.title:
Your business isn't generic.
Neither is your training.
surmesure.subtitle:
Every support starts with listening.
You describe your situation, we build the path that responds to it together.

parler.titre: Everyone around you talks about AI.
parler.soustitre: But no one has shown you what it changes for your job.
parler.description:
You read articles, you see impressive demos, but you don't make the connection with your daily work.
What you need isn't technical training. It's someone who understands your job AND AI, and bridges the gap.
parler.reponse: Field diagnosis, demonstrations on your use cases, pragmatic roadmap.

debrouiller.titre: Your teams manage on their own with ChatGPT.
debrouiller.soustitre: You don't know what they're doing or what they risk.
debrouiller.description:
Shadow AI is already in your business. Without framework, without consistency, sometimes with sensitive data.
The problem isn't the tool. It's the lack of method.
debrouiller.reponse: Audit of existing uses, training by skill level, co-constructed AI charter.

retard.soustitre: But you don't know where to start.
retard.description:
The paralysis of the executive who sees everyone moving (or believes everyone is moving).
You don't need a 200-slide transformation plan.
You need a concrete first step.
retard.reponse: Executive seminar, opportunity mapping, first use cases within 48h.

generique.titre: Generic training doesn't fit your reality.
generique.description:
You sent employees to "generative AI" training. They came back knowing how to write prompts, but not how to apply them to their job.
You need your teams to know what to do concretely with AI in THEIR daily work.
generique.reponse: Co-construction with your managers, real business use cases, exercises on your own documents.

surmesure.qualiopi:
All our custom training is delivered by ALIA Formation (Qualiopi certified).
OPCO funding available depending on your professional branch.

cta.text: Let's discuss your situation for 30 minutes
cta.subtitle:
A free exchange, without commitment.
To understand your context before proposing anything.

prerequis.title: Prerequisites
items: Ability to create a custom assistant on at least one platform (Custom GPT, Claude Project or Gemini Gem)
Complete the pre-training questionnaire sent beforehand

formateur.title: Trainer and training organization
formateur.bio:
Consultant in digital transformation and artificial intelligence.
Supports SME and mid-cap executives and their teams in the operational integration of generative AI.

metadata.title: Building with Claude - Advanced training
metadata.description: 2 days to make Claude your co-architect. Method of challenging dialogue, mastery of the 5 pillars: memory, project, skill, plugin, Claude Code. Qualiopi certified via ALIA Formation.
metadata.ogDescription: The day your only limit becomes your imagination. 2 days to make Claude your co-architect, not your executor.

hero.title: Building with
hero.accroche:
The day your only limit becomes your imagination!
In two days, you learn to make Claude your co-architect.
hero.description: You lead, you arbitrate, you make the calls. Often alone, with no peer who truly challenges your decisions. Building with Claude is about creating the thinking partner you've been missing. One that tests your choices, doesn't flatter, and holds up in your work. For that, a dialogue method and five pillars: memory, project, skill, plugin, Claude Code.

formateur.description: He opens his atelier in full transparency. His real environment, his actual production plugins (Mon Greffier, Mnemos), his method at work right in front of you. You're not watching a polished demo. You're stepping onto his construction site.

az.description: She intervenes live, challenges your choices, proposes angles you wouldn't have seen, pushes you to iterate. The mirror that tests your thinking, in real time, in front of everyone.

assistant.description: An AI tool prepared for the session, delivered to every participant from day one. It carries all the course content and method, supports you during the training, and stays with you afterwards. Over the two days, you learn to build others, calibrated to your own work needs.

promesse.label: The method
promesse.texte:
Thinking with Claude isn't a gift, it's a method. Four gestures shape this partnership and turn it into a reflex.
The most important one isn't technical. It's the ability to communicate, explore, think out loud with Claude as with a peer who tests your thinking, not an executor filling in the blanks.

structurer.texte: Make Claude know you. Memory, preferences, project. The day you stop re-explaining who you are and what you're after at every conversation.

coconstruire.texte: Dialogue as method. You keep the thinking, Claude holds the pen, the mirror, the counter-argument. Iterating, challenging, testing: that's where Claude becomes your partner.

automatiser.texte: Capitalize on what works. What you used to redo every Friday now runs every night. Skills become bricks, connectors bridge Claude to your real professional life.

etendre.texte: Your tool speaks your business, because you shaped it for it. Plugins, Claude Code: you build what existed nowhere else, because nobody had built it for you.

supports.texte: The skills you built and the workflows you automated remain operational in your real environment. They work for you, not in a sandbox.

assistant.texte: The AI Mentor you co-built the training with keeps evolving at the pace of your usage. Same context, same method, same partnership.

ressources.texte: Your captured prompts, configured connectors, refined skills: an atelier that grows with you, not a binder that gathers dust.

evaluation.texte: A month later, we measure the real impact: which skills do you use? Which automations run? What's left to build? The method continues beyond the training.

programme.label: In two days
programme.title: From user to pilot, from pilot to architect

piliers.soustitre: Five Claude tools to master. Together, they hold the edifice up. None of them turns you into a developer. All of them make you autonomous.

memoire.texte: Claude recognizes you. Preferences, context, useful history: you no longer start from scratch at every conversation.

projet.texte: Claude inhabits a space. Cowork, knowledge base, instructions: a structured atelier where work accumulates instead of evaporating.

skill.texte: Claude does it without you thinking about it. Every recurring business process becomes a brick, triggered by a word, adaptable to the real case.

plugin.texte: Claude becomes a business tool. You assemble your bricks into an edifice, connected to your data, dedicated to your field.

claudeCode.texte: Claude builds with you. No need to code: you know what it makes possible and how to ask for it. Your only limit becomes your imagination.

programme.certif: Fundable. Training delivered by ALIA Formation, a Qualiopi-certified organization. Detailed PDF program available for download at the top of the page, or sent on request.

prerequis.title: Prerequisites
items: Regular use of Claude for at least 1 month (conversations, projects)
Active Claude Pro or Team subscription
Complete the pre-training questionnaire sent beforehand

formateur.title: Trainer and training organization
formateur.bio:
Consultant in digital transformation and artificial intelligence, AI architect.
Co-creator of plugins and applications with Claude (Anthropic): Mnemos (contextual memory), Mon Greffier (assistant for consular judges).
During the training, he opens his own atelier in full transparency: real environment, production plugins, method at work. No sanitized demo, the construction site as it truly is.

metadata.title: AI Solutions - Pragmatic support
metadata.description: A progressive approach to AI: acculturate your teams, identify the right levers, build pragmatically. From small automation tool to structuring project.
metadata.ogDescription: Acculturate before implementing. A progressive and pragmatic approach to business AI.

hero.title: You don't know where to start.
hero.subtitle:
Business owner, I know the reality on the ground.
AI isn't deployed with a slide deck.
It's built step by step, starting from your real problems.

comprendre.title: Acculturate before implementing
comprendre.subtitle:
Most AI projects fail because tools are installed before teams understand what AI knows how to do and what it doesn't.
Our approach reverses the logic: we start with people.

equipes.title: Your teams first
equipes.text: Before any tool, your employees must understand what AI changes in their daily work. Not in theory. On their concrete cases.

identifier.title: Identify the axes
identifier.text: Together, we map the tasks where AI has real impact. Not everywhere. In the right places.

construire.title: Build progressively
construire.text: From small automation tool to more ambitious project. We don't revolutionize your organization. We improve it.

leviers.title: What AI concretely changes in your business

impossible.title: Do what was impossible
impossible.description: You don't have a marketing department, no lawyer, no analyst. AI doesn't replace these positions. It gives you access to skills that were out of reach for your structure.
exemples: An SME executive who produces their own communication materials
A craftsman who analyzes their contracts without going through a lawyer each time
A micro-business that does competitive intelligence without hiring a research analyst

temps.title: Save time
temps.description: Quantify time lost in repetitive tasks. Re-entries, copy-paste between software, manual follow-ups... This time has a cost. AI can drastically reduce it.
exemples: An accounting firm that re-enters 4 hours of data per case
An assistant who manually compiles weekly reports
A customer service that answers the same 20 questions each week

qualite.title: Increase quality
qualite.description: Some tasks aren't repetitive but complex. Analysis, writing, decision support... AI doesn't do them for you. It raises the level of your outputs.
exemples: An executive who wants reliable summary notes before each meeting
A lawyer who analyzes 50 pages of contract looking for risks
A trainer who personalizes their materials for each group

methode.title: Our method
methode.subtitle: No big bang. A logical progression, adapted to your pace.

diagnostiquer.title: Diagnose
diagnostiquer.description: We listen, observe, map. What processes? What pain points? What level of AI maturity in your teams? You leave with a clear vision, not a quote.

acculturer.title: Acculturate
acculturer.description: Your teams discover what AI knows how to do, what it doesn't know how to do, and where it can help them concretely. No jargon, no promises. Demonstrations on their real cases.

construire.title: Build
construire.description: We start small. One tool, one process, one measurable gain. Then we expand if it makes sense. From the script that saves 2 hours per week to the structuring project.

methode.note: Each step is autonomous. You can start with a diagnosis alone, or chain the three. Your pace decides.

pasaire.title: What AI doesn't know how to do
pasaire.subtitle: You deserve to be told the truth before being sold anything.

comprendre.title: Understand your job on its own
comprendre.text: AI doesn't know your customers, your constraints, your culture. Without your expertise, it produces generic content.

jugement.title: Replace human judgment
jugement.text: It analyzes, structures, proposes. But the decision remains yours. And that's very good.

erreur.title: Guarantee zero errors
erreur.text: Generative AIs can be wrong, invent, hallucinate. A good deployment always includes human verification.

methode.title: Function without method
methode.text: A tool without process is a toy. Real adoption requires training, support and follow-up.

cta.title: Let's talk about your situation
cta.subtitle: One hour to understand your context, identify the first levers and see if we can work together. No commitment, no jargon.
cta.footer: Or write to us directly via the contact page.

metadata.title: Our AI tools
metadata.description: Discover our AI applications: Mnemos (persistent memory), CodirAI (decision support), ConfidentIA (anonymization), Mon Greffier (commercial court judge assistant) and SignalPro (economic intelligence).

hero.title: Our AI tools
hero.subtitle: We build the tools we teach. Each application is a concrete demonstration of what AI can do to improve your professional daily life.

metadata.title: About - Stéphane Commenge
metadata.description: Entrepreneur since 1996, Stéphane Commenge supports SME and mid-market executives in concrete AI integration. No theory, results.
metadata.ogDescription: Entrepreneur since 1996, AI consultant for SME and mid-market executives

parcours: I created my first business in 1996, at 23. Then I led profit centers in various sectors from 1998 to 2006, before returning to entrepreneurship. Management, business development, budget arbitrations: the same decisions you make every day, I've been making for nearly 30 years. Often with incomplete information. Always with time constraints.

In early 2025, I started using AI on my own business problems. Not out of technological fascination, but pragmatism. And I discovered something simple: on certain tasks, quality went up and time went down. Not marginally. Radically. So I dug deeper. Methodically. Like analyzing a competitive advantage when you spot one. For a year, I devoted most of my time to understanding what AI really changes in an executive's daily life.

Today, I do for others what I did for myself. I understand your job. I identify where AI creates real value in your context. And I show you how, concretely. No slides, no promises. Live demonstrations, on your cases.

Invested in local civic and economic life, I sit on institutions where rigorous analysis and decision-making under uncertainty are daily work. This also feeds my conviction: AI is a discernment tool, not a shortcut to avoid thinking.

With 16 years of experience in professional training, our training programs are delivered by our partner ALIA Formation, a Qualiopi-certified organization. This national label guarantees the quality of the pedagogical process and allows you to benefit from funding by your OPCO, significantly reducing the cost for your business.

conviction.title: A conviction, not a fad
conviction.text: AI isn't just another technology. It's a paradigm shift in how we work, decide, create. My goal: support you in this transformation with pragmatism and ethics.

claude.title: Why Claude / Anthropic?
claude.text: Anthropic places security and ethics at the heart of its approach (safety-first). Claude excels in complex reasoning, nuance and transparency. It's the tool I recommend for demanding professional use.

ameliore.title: AI that improves humans
ameliore.text: I don't believe in AI that replaces. I believe in AI that amplifies your capabilities, frees time for the essential, and allows you to make better decisions.

voir.title: See before believing
voir.text: No theoretical promises. Each workshop is based on live demonstrations, on concrete cases from your business reality. You see what AI produces, you judge for yourself. This is EvidencAI's founding principle: proof first.

cta.title: Curious to see what AI concretely changes?
cta.subtitle: Two hours. Five participants. Your business reality. Zero technical jargon.

hebergement.title: Hosting and infrastructure
hebergement.adresseValue: 8 rue de la Ville l'Évêque, 75008 Paris, France

souverainete.title: Sovereignty, GDPR and security
souverainete.intro: EvidencAI and its applications (Mon Greffier, ConfidentIA, CodirAI, SignalPro, Mnemos) are hosted in France by Scaleway, a French cloud operator (Iliad group), in the PAR1 datacenter in Paris.
souverainete.rgpd: Your data stays in France, under French law, outside the scope of the US Cloud Act. Hosting with a French operator places your data directly under the GDPR regime, without resorting to the Standard Contractual Clauses required for non-European hosts. Compliance is structural, not contractual.
souverainete.securite: Scaleway datacenters are certified ISO 27001, ISO 27701, HDS and SOC 2. Scaleway is also engaged in the ANSSI SecNumCloud qualification process. Self-hosted Supabase on this infrastructure gives us full control over storage, at-rest encryption and access: no data transits through an uncontrolled third-party service.

objet.title: Article 1 - Purpose
objet.text: These general terms of sale apply to all workshops, training and consulting services offered by EvidencAI.

prix.title: Article 2 - Prices
prix.text: Workshop prices are indicated in euros including VAT. Training and consulting service rates are communicated on personalized quote.

paiement.title: Article 3 - Payment
paiement.text: Payment for workshops is made online via Stripe upon registration. For training and services on quote, a 30% deposit may be requested.

annulation.title: Article 4 - Cancellation and refund
annulation.client: Cancellation by customer: full refund up to 48 hours before the workshop. Beyond that, a credit will be offered for a later session.
annulation.evidencai: Cancellation by EvidencAI: full refund or postponement to a later date.

retractation.title: Article 5 - Right of withdrawal
retractation.text: In accordance with Article L221-28 of the Consumer Code, the right of withdrawal cannot be exercised for professional training services.

pi.title: Article 6 - Intellectual property
pi.text: All training materials remain the exclusive property of EvidencAI. Any unauthorized reproduction or distribution is prohibited.

responsable.title: Data controller
responsable.text: EvidencAI, represented by Stéphane Commenge, is responsible for processing your personal data.

donnees.title: Data collected
donnees.text: We collect the following data: last name, first name, email, phone (optional), company (optional). This data is necessary for managing your registration and communication about your training.

finalites.title: Purposes
items: Management of workshop and training registrations
Sending information about our activities (with your consent)

conservation.title: Retention period
conservation.text: Your data is retained for 3 years from your last interaction with EvidencAI.

droits.title: Your rights
droits.text: In accordance with GDPR, you have a right to access, rectify, erase, limit, object to and port your data. To exercise these rights, contact us at contact@evidencai.com.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text: This site uses Google Analytics and Microsoft Clarity to analyze traffic. You can disable these cookies via your browser settings.

pi.title: Intellectual property
pi.text: All content on this site (text, images, videos, logos) is protected by copyright. Any reproduction, even partial, is prohibited without prior authorization.

credits.title: Credits
credits.technoValue: Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Supabase (self-hosted), Scaleway, Coolify
